title: The Rise of Online Learning: Transforming Education
passage:
The Rise of Online Learning

In recent years, online learning has become increasingly popular as technology advances and educational institutions adapt to new teaching methods. Distance education allows students to learn at their own pace, providing flexibility that traditional classrooms cannot offer. Many universities now offer complete degree programs online, enabling learners to gain qualifications without the need to attend physical classes.

One of the primary benefits of online learning is accessibility. Students from remote areas, or those with mobility issues, can participate in courses that were previously out of reach. Additionally, the variety of courses available online means that learners can choose subjects that align with their personal interests and career goals.

However, online learning also presents challenges. Some students may struggle with self-discipline and may find it difficult to stay motivated without the structure of a classroom environment. Moreover, the lack of face-to-face interaction can hinder the development of important social skills.

Despite these challenges, many educators believe that online learning is the future of education. As technology continues to evolve, it is likely that distance education will become even more integrated into the traditional educational framework, blending the best of both worlds.

questions.instruction: Choose the correct letter, A, B, C or D.
questions.text: What is one major advantage of online learning mentioned in the passage?

options.A: It allows students to learn at their own pace.
options.C: It requires more discipline than traditional classes.
options.D: It eliminates the need for educational qualifications.

questions.explanation: The passage highlights that online learning provides flexibility, allowing students to learn at their own pace, which is a significant advantage.

questions.text: Online learning can be beneficial for students with mobility issues.
questions.explanation: The passage states that online learning offers accessibility for students from remote areas or those with mobility issues.

questions.text: Does the author believe that online learning will replace traditional education?
questions.explanation: The passage suggests that online learning will integrate with traditional education rather than completely replace it.

questions.instruction: Match the statements to the correct paragraphs.
questions.text: Match each statement with the correct paragraph (1-4).

options.A: Online programs can be completed without attending classes.
options.B: Some learners may lack motivation in a virtual environment.
options.C: Students can select courses based on interests.
options.D: Distance education is limited to certain regions.

questions.instruction: Complete the summary with no more than two words.
questions.text: Online learning is popular due to its flexibility and __________.
questions.explanation: The passage mentions accessibility as a key reason for the rise in online learning popularity.

vocabulary.meaning: the quality of being able to change or adapt easily.
the quality of being able to be reached or entered.
the reason or reasons one has for acting or behaving in a particular way.

tactics:
Hướng dẫn

To effectively answer the questions, focus on the main ideas presented in each paragraph. Pay attention to keywords and phrases that may be paraphrased. It may help to underline or highlight important points as you read through the passage.
